suite.name: Memory Leak Guards

test.name: Leak A - Retiring A Host Drops Its AI Controllers

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=TerminalPaneRegistry must expose an onRetire hook fired from retire()
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get File
kw.msg:
${coord} = import AppKit import Foundation import HarnessCore import HarnessTerminalEngine import HarnessTerminalKit import HarnessTheme import UserNotifications
@MainActor final class SessionCoordinator: NSObj...
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Coordinator must drop the inline AI controller when its host retires
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Coordinator must drop the AI chat controller when its host retires
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Host retire (close + prune both funnel through retire()) must notify the coordinator so the parallel AI-controller dicts can't grow forever.

test.name: Leak B - Browser Network Capture Is Bounded

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Network capture pushes must call __cap() to trim the ring
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.arg: msg=Use a monotonic seq for ids, not array length (collides after trim)
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: The injected fetch/XHR capture array must be capped so a long-lived page cannot grow it without bound.

test.name: Leak C - Every Per-Surface Dict In Coordinator Has Retire Cleanup

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: OK: 2 dict(s) all have retire cleanup: inlineAIControllers, aiChatControllers
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Every private var [String: T] in SessionCoordinator must have a .removeValue call inside the onRetire closure. This guard catches the "insert-only dict" pattern before it ships — add the dict, forget the cleanup, this fails at PR time.

suite.doc: Regression guards for memory-leak fixes. Leak A: SessionCoordinator's per-surface AI controller dicts only ever inserted (one pair per pane) and were never removed on close — every closed pane leaked its Inline/Chat controllers + subviews. Leak B: Browser pane network-capture JS array grew without bound on long-lived polling/streaming pages. Leak C: Structural guard — any NEW [String: T] dict added to SessionCoordinator must have a .removeValue in the onRetire closure. Prevents future contributors from repeating the insert-only pattern.
